title: clematis heracleifolia subsp. lavallei
intro: Clematis heracleifolia subsp. lavallei, also known as Clematis Lavallei, is a perennial climber native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Clematis Lavallei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Clematis Lavallei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
